mapper.sql: SELECT P.PLANT_NO , M.MEMBER_NAME , P.PLANT_NAME , P.CLASSIFICATION , P.CREATE_DATE , P.DEL_YN FROM PLANT P JOIN MEMBER M ON P.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO

WHERE
M.MEMBER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%'
P.PLANT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%'
P.CLASSIFICATION LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%'
P.GROWTH_INFO LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%'
P.PLANT_INFO LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%'
( M.MEMBER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%' OR P.PLANT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%' OR P.CLASSIFICATION LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%' OR P.GROWTH_INFO LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%' OR P.PLANT_INFO LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%' )
ORDER BY P.PLANT_NO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
mapper.select: SELECT PLANT_NO , PLANT_NAME , CLASSIFICATION , CARBON_CAPTURE , PLANT_INFO , GROWTH_INFO , PLANT_API FROM PLANT WHERE PLANT_NO = #{plantNo}
mapper.update:
UPDATE PLANT SET DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE PLANT_NO IN
#{plantNo}

UPDATE PLANT SET DEL_YN = 'Y' WHERE PLANT_NO IN
#{plantNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLANT P JOIN MEMBER M ON P.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO
SELECT PLANT_NO FROM PLANT WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} ORDER BY PLANT_NO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
